hypothesis: If MACE, NequIP, and ViSNet are implemented in JAX and a gated, species-dependent MACE variant is trained on SPICE2 with the described regimen, then they will match the energy/force accuracy of Torch baselines while achieving faster GPU molecular dynamics runtimes on H100 (via JAX-MD or ASE) because XLA compilation and species-gated message passing reduce inference overhead without sacrificing model expressivity.
